MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: June Leathley. Jeffrey Evan Marguiles, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Bay City Properties, LLC and there being no appearance by Defendant, Aby Chacko, the case went off settlement conference, request for jury trial is stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
